title: Pointer tool schema
description: JSON Schema describing every tool the LLM can invoke. Shared by the mac client (action executor) and the backend (LLM tool registration + safety validator).

tier.description: Tier governs the confirmation UX and the safety validator. 'safe' tools auto-execute, 'automation' and 'destructive' tools show a 5s countdown (Enter confirms early, Esc cancels).

tools.name: copy_to_clipboard
tools.description: Copy a string to the system clipboard.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the web for current information, reviews, prices, news, and facts beyond what is visible on screen. Use when the user asks for more details, reviews, comparisons, or research about something they are looking at.

query.description: Specific search query, e.g. 'Ballston Local Arlington VA restaurant reviews'

tools.name: search_places
tools.description: Search for nearby places (restaurants, shops, services) using the user's location when available.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Open a URL in the browser. Use new_tab:true to open in a new tab while keeping Pointer available.

tools.name: find_ax_element
tools.description: Find UI elements in the focused window by role or title/label. Returns paths for ax_press.

tools.name: ax_press
tools.description: Press a button, link, or menu item via Accessibility API using a path from find_ax_element.

tools.name: ax_set_value
tools.description: Set text on an accessibility element by path.

tools.name: ax_focus
tools.description: Move keyboard focus to an accessibility element by path.

tools.name: invoke_menu
tools.description: Invoke a menu bar item by title path, e.g. ["Format", "Font", "Bold"].

tools.name: media_control
tools.description: Control system media playback: play, pause, next, previous.

tools.name: run_shortcut
tools.description: Run a macOS Shortcuts automation by name.

tools.name: paste_text
tools.description: Paste a string into the currently focused text field. Prefers AXValueAttribute; falls back to a synthetic Cmd+V.

tools.name: replace_selection
tools.description: Replace the current selection in the focused field with the provided text.

tools.name: click_at
tools.description: Synthesize a left-click at a screen point in global coordinates.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type a string at the current keyboard focus.

tools.name: key_chord
tools.description: Synthesize a key chord such as cmd+s or ctrl+shift+t.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launch an application by name or bundle ID. Use this when the user says 'open Safari', 'launch Finder', etc. Works even if the app is not already running.

name.description: App name, e.g. Safari, Finder, Chrome

tools.name: focus_app
tools.description: Bring a running app to the foreground by bundle identifier. Prefer launch_app if the app may not be running.

tools.name: open_path
tools.description: Open a file or folder path in its default application (files) or Finder (directories). Tilde paths like ~/Documents work.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and folders at a path. Returns names and whether each entry is a directory.

tools.name: run_applescript
tools.description: Run an AppleScript snippet. Used for app-specific actions where AX is insufficient.

tools.name: read_ax_tree
tools.description: Read the accessibility tree of the focused window for grounding subsequent actions.
